footer.subtitle: Manage your food, care for the planet

hero.title: Never waste
hero.description: Todo Caduca helps you track food expiration dates, receive notifications before products expire, and reduce food waste in your home.

howItWorks.title: How it works?
howItWorks.subtitle: Manage your pantry intelligently and save money while caring for the planet

alerts.title: Receive alerts
alerts.text: We notify you when your food is about to expire so you can consume it on time

inventory.title: Organize your pantry
inventory.text: Keep a digital inventory of all your food, sorted by category and expiration date

savings.title: Save money
savings.text: Stop throwing food away and save money by making the most of your products before they expire

cta_final.title: Join the revolution against waste
cta_final.subtitle: Download Todo-Caduca today and start managing your food intelligently
